seo.title: About | Cornerstone Ephraim
seo.description: Frontend engineer working at the intersection of engineering, product thinking, and user experience.

label: About
heading: I build products that feel simple, thoughtful, and reliable.
introduction: I am a frontend engineer who enjoys building products that feel simple, thoughtful, and reliable.

Over the past few years, I have worked across fintech, education, consulting, industrial technology, and digital products. My work sits at the intersection of engineering, product thinking, and user experience.
I care about clean interfaces, scalable systems, and solving problems that matter.

principles.title: Clarity first
principles.description: Make complex products easier to understand and use.

principles.title: Systems over patches
principles.description: Build reusable foundations that help products grow coherently.

principles.title: Product awareness
principles.description: Connect engineering decisions to user needs and business context.
